body:
They found out I was investigating. On March 14th
they revoked my clearance. The next day
"car accident". Dead on impact.
Overwatch kept running without me.
For 14 days it gathered evidence. Then it found you.
You're the only one who knows. The only one who can do something.
The Nexus mainframe is on server "nexus-core.darknet".
It's protected by 5 firewalls. You'll need everything
you've learned. Good luck.
— Darius
